label: Staking
description: Stake or unstake tokens across protocols. Shows protocol APY, yield earned, TVL, and unbonding period.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[defi-trading]. 0.3 availableOn=[defi]. 0.4 no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 no lib/mocks imports in widget. 0.6 FormWidget accepts isLoading; context is synchronous mock with no async loading — wired isLoading={false} to document intent. 0.7 empty guard via if(!selected) present. 0.8 submission errors displayed via FormWidget error={error} from useFormSubmit; WidgetErrorBoundary covers crashes; context exposes no context-level error field. 0.9 no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — data via useDeFiData(). 1.2 pass — context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 pass — adjustedStakingProtocols memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx). 1.4 partial — clientIds destructured and acknowledged in context; StakingProtocol has no clientId field so full narrowing requires schema change (BP-5 scope). 1.5 pass for tradeHistory; stakingProtocols is a protocol reference list (not strategy data) so strategyId filter is N/A. 1.6 pass — empty organizationIds returns all data (hasDefiDesk=true). 1.7 known-gap — STAKING_PROTOCOLS in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

findings.description: 0.6 Context exposes no isLoading field (synchronous mock data). FormWidget loading infra is wired with isLoading={false} to document that loading path was considered. No fix needed until context gains async loading.

0.8 Context exposes no context-level error field. Submission errors are handled via useFormSubmit + FormWidget error prop. Crash errors covered by WidgetErrorBoundary. Acceptable for mock-data context.
1.3 stakingProtocols list not filtered by org scope — fixed: adjustedStakingProtocols memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk.
1.4 No client-level filter cascade for stakingProtocols. clientIds now destructured and acknowledged; StakingProtocol has no clientId field — narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change.
1.7 STAKING_PROTOCOLS reference data lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-staking instead of lib/constants/ or lib/config/. Moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — adjustedStakingProtocols memo with hasDefiDesk guard
